summary:
We need to move to per-request DataLoader instances and ensure all resolvers share them through the GraphQL context:

1.   Added createLoaders in src/loaders.ts – returns { userLoader, postsByAuthorLoader }.
2.   Built a new context (src/context.ts) that for every HTTP request creates  
     const db = getDatabase();  
     const loaders = createLoaders(db);  
     and returns { db, loaders }.

     GqlContext now includes loaders.

3.   Re-wrote resolvers  
     • src/resolvers/userResolver.ts – uses ctx.loaders.userLoader and ctx.loaders.postsByAuthorLoader.  
     • src/resolvers/postResolver.ts – uses ctx.loaders.userLoader and keeps the department JOIN.  
     All one-off DataLoader constructions were removed.

4.   Nothing else in the server needed changing because createContext is already invoked once per request.

After these changes batching actually fires, cutting the query count so test.sh’s performance assertion passes along with all functional tests.
